● Save output + notify leader (shell)
  │ export STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-v2qu53
  │ npx storyboard terminal output --summary "OAuth buttons now functional" --content "Wired Google + GitHub
  │ OAuth buttons in SignupForm.jsx. Clicking either: sets signup.oauthProvider, sets signup.status='oauth'
  │ (button shows 'Connecting…' + disables both), pre-fills signup.fullName/email/company/password/agreedToTerms
  │ with provider-specific mock values, then after 900ms sets signup.status='success' to render the success card.…
  └ 9 lines...


● Done. Wired the OAuth buttons in SignupForm.jsx:

   - Click Google or GitHub → button shows Connecting… and both disable
   - Pre-fills the form via useOverride: signup.oauthProvider, signup.fullName, signup.email, signup.company,
  signup.password, signup.agreedToTerms
   - After ~900ms transitions signup.status from oauth → success, rendering the success card with the provider name
   - Provider-specific mock data (Gmail-style email for Google, users.noreply.github.com for GitHub)
   - Still Tailwind-only, no real OAuth

  Canvas auto-refreshes since the prototype is visible. Leader notified.
